zh.lifeSummary: 當Guilhem "Le Jeune" D'AUMELAS於1112年出生在法國藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也時，他的父親Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER39歲，母親Ermessinde de MELGUEIL48歲。他和Tiburge d'Orange至少有3個女兒。他去世於1156年6月5日在法國奧其坦尼賀勞爾特奧米拉斯享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guilhem "Le Jeune" D'AUMELAS于1112年出生在法国藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也时，他的父亲Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER39岁，母亲Ermessinde de MELGUEIL48岁。他和Tiburge d'Orange至少有3个女儿。他去世于1156年6月5日在法国奧其坦尼賀勞爾特奧米拉斯享年44岁。

meanings: Short form of   Lewis   or respelling of   Lou  , as borne by the impresario  Lew Grade  (  1906–98 , originally  Louis Winogradsky ).

nameMeanings.name: Jeune"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jean
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Guilhem "Le Jeune" D'AUMELAS was born in 1112, in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, his father, Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER, was 39 and his mother, Ermessinde de MELGUEIL, was 48. He had at least 3 daughters with Tiburge d'Orange. He died on 5 June 1156, in Aumelas, Hérault, Occitanie, France, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guilhem "Le Jeune" D'AUMELAS est né en 1112, à Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, son père, Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Ermessinde de MELGUEIL, avait 48 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Tiburge d'Orange. Il est décédé le 5 juin 1156, à Aumelas, Hérault, Occitanie, France, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guilhem "Le Jeune" D'AUMELAS 1112 in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER 39 und seine Mutter Ermessinde de MELGUEIL 48. Er hatte mit Tiburge d'Orange mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Juni 1156 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Aumelas, Hérault, Occitanie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guilhem "Le Jeune" D'AUMELAS è nato il nel 1112 nel Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Ermessinde de MELGUEIL, aveva 48 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Tiburge d'Orange. Morì il 5 giugno 1156, nel Aumelas, Hérault, Occitanie, Francia, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guilhem "Le Jeune" D'AUMELASが1112年にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンheラウルトモントペリールで生まれた時，父Guillaume V de MONTPELLIERは39歳，母Ermessinde de MELGUEILは48歳であった。彼はTiburge d'Orangeとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1156年6月5日にフランスオクシタニーheラウルトアウメラスで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guilhem "Le Jeune" D'AUMELAS(이)가 1112년 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 he라트 몽펠리어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermessinde de MELGUEIL(은)는 48세였다. 그는 Tiburge d'Orange(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1156년 6월 5일 프랑스 옥시탠이 he라트 오멀라스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guilhem "Le Jeune" D'AUMELAS nasceu em 1112, em Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, seu pai, Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Ermessinde de MELGUEIL, tinha 48 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Tiburge d'Orange. Ele faleceu em 5 de junho de 1156, em Aumelas, Hérault, Occitanie, França, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guilhem "Le Jeune" D'AUMELAS родился в 1112 г. в местности монтпеллиир, хeраулт, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermessinde de MELGUEIL, 48. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Tiburge d'Orange. Он умер 5 июня 1156 г. в местности аумелас, хeраулт, окситани, Франция в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guilhem "Le Jeune" D'AUMELAS nació en 1112, en Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, su papá, Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Ermessinde de MELGUEIL, tenía 48 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Tiburge d'Orange. Murió el 5 de junio de 1156, en Aumelas, Hérault, Occitanie, Francia, a la edad de 44 años.
